meaning: n.<美>(环绕城市或某一地区的)环路,环形公路
examples: Interstate 295 is a 20-mile beltway that bypasses Jacksonville's busy downtown area.
This is a Beltway detail of major significance.
That's right. The effect is not going to be isolated inside the Beltway.
Even after decades of Inside-the-Beltway entitlement talk, very little has registered with real people.
This is another illustration of the inside-the-Beltway adage that no bad deed goes unrewarded.
